memory.summary:
On October 12th, Caroline confirmed Mei's attendance at the zine club meeting the next day and arranged to meet for lunch at the café near the park at 1 PM. She also invited Mei for a coffee catch-up at her place that evening at 7 PM, to which Mei agreed and mentioned bringing her archives for their musical ideas discussion.

In addition, Caroline and Noor discussed her new startup idea with Noor at the market, who was making exciting progress on her AI project. They decided to turn their catch-up into a double date with Peter and Diego, suggesting they meet at the café on Thursday at 7 PM. Noor agreed, and they decided to grab some street tacos there.

Caroline later discussed the musical project over coffee with Peter at the café the next day at 3 PM. Caroline's upcoming schedule now includes meetings for the musical project, startup idea, and the new double date and coffee catch-up, all taking place at the café and Caroline's place. Peter's upcoming schedule also includes a meeting with Andy on October 8th and the musical project discussion at the café on October 13th.

Subsequently, Caroline also arranged to meet Mei at the café on October 12th at 5 PM to continue their discussion on community projects and ideas.

memory.summary:
On October 12, 2025, at 6 AM, Leo met Diego at the train station for a discussion about a new melody for their collaboration with Caroline and Peter. They decided to meet again at the park on Thursday at 12 PM and at the library café on Friday at 1 PM to finalize the details. Leo had a conversation with Andy at a restaurant on the same day at 10 AM. Andy expressed his interest in their musical collaboration and they agreed to meet at the library café the following day at 1 PM to discuss further.

Leo and Peter had another conversation at a restaurant on October 12, 2025, at 13:00. They decided to bring Leo and Noor into the AI project discussion, which they planned to make official at the park near the big oak tree on Thursday at 3 PM. Peter will bring the sketches, and Noor will bring the coffee, just like old times. They look forward to the meeting.

Later on October 12, 2025, at 3 PM, Leo talked to Caroline at a cafe. Caroline informed Leo that the startup with Diego and Peter is going well and they planned to meet next Thursday at 7 PM to discuss further. They decided to make it a double date and share some street tacos. Leo also mentioned his meeting with Samantha tomorrow at the park, but he was free to catch up with Caroline today until 5 PM. They agreed to meet at the park at 4 PM.
